meta.description: Source registry. Each source's CLASS caps the tiers it can justify (seed.md §6). A source cannot push an event above the confidence its class warrants.

sources.name: BLS JOLTS (Public Data API v2)
sources.notes: Measured baseline. Rigorous, lagged ~2 months, causation-blind.

sources.name: FRED (St. Louis Fed)
sources.notes: Mirrors JOLTS + macro baselines, recession shading, cross-checks.

sources.name: SEC EDGAR
sources.notes: 8-K / 10-Q disclosures with headcount. Can justify A1/B1.

sources.name: California EDD WARN portal
sources.notes: State WARN filings. Public record; often precede announcements.

sources.name: Snap Inc. — official statement / earnings call
sources.notes: Primary firm attribution. Can justify A1/B1.

sources.name: Challenger, Gray & Christmas — Job Cut Report
sources.notes: Announced/cited cuts. Tracks AI as a stated reason since 2023. A2; B-tier <= B2 unless quoting the firm. Enters via Phase-1 manifest (no clean API).

sources.name: Layoffs.fyi (Roger Lee)
sources.notes: Tech/startup aggregator. A2; B-tier <= B2. Free with attribution. Enters via Phase-1 manifest.

sources.name: Reuters
sources.notes: A2; B-tier <= B3 unless quoting a primary attribution.

sources.name: Bloomberg
sources.notes: A2; B-tier <= B3 unless quoting a primary attribution.

sources.name: Anonymous social post / unverified memo
sources.notes: A3; B3 only. Captured but heavily discounted.
